# module: orders.py
# Correct: refactor shared logic into an independent core module to enforce strict unidirectional data flow
from core.models import Order
from core.events import emit_payment_event

def place_order():
    emit_payment_event()


# module: payments.py
from core.models import Order
from core.database import save_status

def process_payment(order_id):
    save_status(order_id, "PAID")
